final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical infographic showing how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and integrate with GLMCodingPlan (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a clean technical documentation aesthetic — references in the spirit of GitHub documentation illustrations, Docker official docs visual style, modern SaaS onboarding step-by-step graphics; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 4-step vertical or horizontal flow layout with clear numbered sections 1-2-3-4
Subject: must include Docker container visualization, Hermes deployment process, GLMCodingPlan integration
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean technical workspace or server environment context — exact setting is yours
Lighting/medium: needs a clear, professional documentation atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a tech-forward direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1", "2", "3", "4" with corresponding Chinese instructional text for: 1) Docker环境准备与Hermes镜像拉取, 2) 容器配置与端口映射设置, 3) Hermes服务启动与基础配置, 4) GLMCodingPlan接入与验证测试
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 4 clear sequential steps with visual separation; must show command/code snippets as visual elements
Avoid: must avoid cluttered layout that obscures step clarity; must avoid English text in labels unless it's technical terminology (Docker, Hermes, GLMCodingPlan)
